message:
refactor(scripts): replace pathlib read_text with open().read() and fix check logic

Simplify file reading in all check_*.py verification scripts by replacing
__import__("pathlib").Path(...).read_text(encoding="utf-8") with plain
open(...).read(). Also fix variable naming consistency (contains_sec ->
has_secret) and update check patterns to match current crate API surface
(e.g. check_all_detailed -> monitors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
